sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value STRING);
UPDATE test_table SET value = ifnull(value, 'updated_value') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, ifnull(value, 'no_value') AS checked_value FROM test_table;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, ifnull(value, 'fallback')) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
